mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_title AS roomTitle, r.deposit AS deposit, r.monthly_rent AS monthlyRent, r.status AS status, ( SELECT ri.image_url FROM room_image ri WHERE ri.room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY ri.sort_order ASC, ri.image_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl FROM favorites f INNER JOIN rooms r ON f.room_id = r.room_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'HIDDEN') ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
